title: Collection Persistence, Versioned Schemas, Atomic Replacement, and Restore
description: The program writes live maps directly to the final file, trusts arbitrary JSON on load, has no schema version, loses permissions on replacement, and cannot recover from interruption. Learners cumulatively produce versioned atomic offline collection store through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Keep browser lessons on pure byte models and place native filesystem effects behind an injected save and load port.
Define version, application identity, timestamp policy, records, provenance, and checksum or integrity scope with deterministic encoding.
Bound bytes, decode exactly one document, validate schema and every record, reject duplicates, and preserve the last valid in-memory state on error.
